title: Cataclysm Compat
description: Adds compat between L_Ender's Cataclysm and various other mods!
body:
**Description:**

This datapack* adds compatability between many mods and L_Ender's Cataclysm by allowing various features from these mods to be more compataible with other mods. Additonally this datapack* works on all versions and loaders of modded minecraft.


**Important Notice:**

*Keep in mind this is a datpack and not a resourcepack and can be more complicated to install and play with it is suggested to use a mod such as [Paxi](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paxi) to make it simple.


**Supported Mods:**

- Twigs
- Habitat
- Autumnity
- Alexs Mobs
- Endergetic Expansion
- Infernal Expansion
- Dungeon Now Loading
